generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor deployed in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detection sensor for space usage monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensor for visual comfort assessment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy status data from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Lighting level measurements for visual comfort analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for MQTT-based IoT connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationPredictiveAnalyticsService, VisualComfortAssessmentService, NonVisualHealthAnalysisService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and device configuration"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingOperationsSimulationService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for semantic building representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingOperationsSimulationService, VisualComfortAssessmentService
]

instance MDETechniques : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated deployment of runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingOperationsSimulationService, EnergyOptimizationPredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic BIM model enriched with device metadata and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, MDETechniques
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of environmental conditions including temperature, occupancy, and lighting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationPredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization using reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAssessmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of visual comfort based on lighting and occupancy data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health impacts from environmental factors"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations for decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance BuildingOperationsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for life cycle management and decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides LifeCycleDecisionSupportInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for reducing energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for adjusting lighting to improve occupant visual comfort"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health impacts from environmental conditions"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous environmental monitoring data for facility management"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operational states"
]

instance LifeCycleDecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from building operations simulation for life cycle management"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator for temperature regulation"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for adjusting lighting levels in building spaces"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin and sent to Building Control System (BCS) actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling automated adjustments to physical systems based on virtual simulations and analytics."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization, with data updates and control actions occurring continuously to maintain accurate alignment between the physical building and its digital counterpart, as evidenced by real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for custom services; orchestrated through roles of Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all phases of the building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment, with the Digital Twin representing the 'as operated' state through real-time monitoring and control of physical assets."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness; synchronization techniques to prevent semantic drift between digital models and physical counterparts, ensuring alignment over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication protocols via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and digital twin."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards, with standardized extension points for service integration and Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocols for interoperable data exchange across heterogeneous systems."
]
